teamMembers.name: Justin Stark
teamMembers.title: Owner & Lead Agent
teamMembers.bio: With over 7 years of experience in the insurance industry, Justin founded Pontotoc Insurance Agency to provide personalized service to the local community. He specializes in all lines of insurance and is committed to finding the best coverage at competitive rates.

teamMembers.name: Sarah Johnson
teamMembers.title: Senior Insurance Agent
teamMembers.bio: Sarah brings 6 years of expertise in health and life insurance. She has helped hundreds of families find the right coverage for their needs and is passionate about educating clients about their options.

teamMembers.name: Mike Thompson
teamMembers.title: Auto & Home Specialist
teamMembers.bio: Mike specializes in property and casualty insurance with 5 years of experience. He understands the unique needs of Mississippi homeowners and drivers, helping them protect what matters most.
